Useful words

  • 虹鱒 にじます · nijimasu rainbow trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss)
  • 虹彩 こうさい · kousai iris

Example sentences

  • 虹を見ます。I look at the kanji 虹.

What to watch

Learn 虹 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and stroke-order practice.
